Records.authors: Groote, S., Korner, J.G., Pivovarov, A.A.
Records.description: Two-loop sunrise self-energy with three internal masses m1, m2, m3 in D=2 Euclidean space-time, evaluated via configuration-space representation S(1,1,1) = (1/(2pi)^2) int_0^infty J_0(p x) K_0(m1 x) K_0(m2 x) K_0(m3 x) x dx (Eq. S111). The paper numerically tests the second-order differential equation of Laporta-Remiddi for the equal-mass case (Eq. remiddi2, simplified in D=2 to Eq. remiddi22) at precision ~10^{-8}, and the Mueller-Stach-Weinzierl-Zayadeh DE for arbitrary masses (Section 5, with explicit polynomial coefficients p_0(t), p_1(t), p_2(t), p_3(t) and symmetric-monomial M_{lambda1 lambda2 lambda3} structure) at precision ~10^{-4}. Two typos in the c(t,m1,m2,m3) coefficients of the preprint MullerStach:2011ru were identified and corrected.
Records.location: Sections 4-5, Eq. (S111) for S(1,1,1); equal-mass DE Eqs. (remiddi2)-(remiddi22); arbitrary-mass DE coefficients p_0..p_3 in Section 5
